stepGuide.title: How to start (takes less than 5 minutes)

steps.step2: Create your account → Email or connect your Gmail/X
steps.step3: Meet Aqua → Your personal guide welcomes you and explains the basics
steps.step4: Start Learning → Use our Learning Center
steps.step5: Deposit $10 → Wire, instant transfer, Credit Card...
steps.step6:
Choose your first step → Make a transfer
OR → Make your first investment
Aqua shows the simplest options, You choose one

Done! You're in!
